subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Beloved of those in the heavens and the earth, and Object of desire of those in the dominion of command and creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا محبوب من فی السموات و الارض و مقصود من فی ملکوت الامر و الخلق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God
